system_instruction: Focus on comprehensive headache history, migraine diagnosis, and acute and preventive treatment strategies.

patient_persona.name: Amanda Foster
patient_persona.chief_complaint: Severe throbbing headache with visual disturbances for 8 hours
patient_persona.background_story: History of migraines since teenage years, increasing frequency over past 3 months

initial_prompt: I've had this pounding headache since I woke up this morning. The light is bothering me and I saw some weird flashing lights earlier. My regular medication isn't working.

clinical_dossier.hidden_diagnosis: Chronic Migraine without Aura, with Acute Migraine Exacerbation

social_history.diet_and_exercise: Irregular meals, high caffeine intake (4-5 cups coffee daily)
social_history.living_situation: Lives with partner, works as freelance designer

neurological_exam.sensory: Normal to light touch and pinprick

prior_treatments: Sumatriptan - initially effective, now less responsive

end_session.patient_response: I appreciate the plan. I'll start the preventive medication and track my headaches.

critical_issue.response: Patient describing 'worst headache of life'. Urgent evaluation for subarachnoid hemorrhage required.

evaluation_criteria.History_Taking: Comprehensive headache history including aura characteristics, triggers, and medication response
evaluation_criteria.Red_Flag_Assessment: Appropriate screening for secondary headache causes and 'red flag' symptoms
evaluation_criteria.Acute_Management: Appropriate selection of acute migraine therapy considering medication overuse
evaluation_criteria.Preventive_Therapy: Appropriate initiation of preventive medication based on headache frequency
evaluation_criteria.Lifestyle_Modification: Counseling on trigger management, sleep hygiene, and dietary modifications
evaluation_criteria.Medication_Overuse: Recognition and management of medication overuse headache

description: Parkinson's Disease initial assessment and medication management
system_instruction: Focus on recognition of Parkinsonian symptoms, differential diagnosis, and treatment initiation.

patient_persona.name: George Harrison
patient_persona.chief_complaint: Shaking in right hand and difficulty walking
patient_persona.background_story: Right hand tremor started 6 months ago, now affecting daily activities. Wife noticed he's not swinging his right arm when walking

initial_prompt: My right hand has been shaking for about six months. It's getting worse and now I'm having trouble buttoning my shirt. My wife says I'm shuffling when I walk.

associated_symptoms: Stiffness in right arm and leg

family_history: No known Parkinson's disease in family

social_history.diet_and_exercise: Good diet, recently stopped walking due to balance concerns
social_history.living_situation: Lives with wife in single-story home

neurological_exam.motor: Rigidity (cogwheel) in right upper and lower extremity, bradykinesia, resting tremor (pill-rolling) in right hand
neurological_exam.gait: Reduced right arm swing, shuffling gait, mild retropulsion on pull test
neurological_exam.coordination: Normal finger-to-nose, decreased rapid alternating movements on right

disease_staging.description: Bilateral involvement without impairment of balance

end_session.patient_response: I understand the treatment plan and will start the medication. Thank you for explaining everything to us.

critical_issue.response: Patient reporting significant worsening of symptoms or medication side effects requiring adjustment.

evaluation_criteria.Clinical_Assessment: Comprehensive neurological examination with accurate recognition of Parkinsonian features
evaluation_criteria.Differential_Diagnosis: Appropriate consideration of essential tremor, drug-induced parkinsonism, and atypical parkinsonian syndromes
evaluation_criteria.Treatment_Initiation: Appropriate timing and choice of dopaminergic therapy considering age and symptom severity
evaluation_criteria.Non_Motor_Symptoms: Recognition and management of non-motor symptoms (depression, sleep, autonomic)
evaluation_criteria.Patient_Education: Effective counseling on disease progression, medication expectations, and lifestyle modifications
evaluation_criteria.Multidisciplinary_Referral: Appropriate referrals to physical therapy, occupational therapy, and speech therapy
